transcript.text:
*Help me! Help!
*It's okay
The octopus weighs 3KG!
She will eat it all
She will eat it
She can't do it
There's no way she can finish it alone
Tell her to try it if she wants to
She'll get tired of the same taste
I think she can do it
*People that know Tzuyang vs People that don't know Tzuyang
*Gangwon Province, Gosung County
Hello everyone
I am here at the beach today
It's Summer season now
The color of the Pacific Ocean is beautiful

On my way to eat some delicious food today
*On her way to feast!
That's pretty big
Give me a tasty octopus
A tasty one? Yes!
Boiled as a whole
*I'm scared!
*Common Octopus
*Sashimi served with Cold Spicy Sauce and Salad (Large Size)
Wow that's a lot of sashimi!
That's huge!
Can I finish it all?
It looks very tender
This is the octopus and this is the sashimi
Check the bottom
It's full of sashimi

Put in some ice
That looks delicious
This is perfect for a hot Summer day
This looks amazing
There's so much meat (sashimi)
Is it usually this much?
They have vegetable in here too
It looks yummy
What fish did they use?
The fish is very soft
Is it fish? It's as soft as a Scallop
A pile of seafood
Let's try the octopus now
This is unbelievably huge
That's hot!
Grab a tentacle

Is this Rock Octopus? (Nope, it's Common Octopus)
Octopus are usually tough to chew
It's not as soft as a Giant Octopus
But it's as tender
Did you see that?
It just cuts right off
I don't feel the need to dip any sauce
This part is tough to chew
It's usually like that
It's already missing a tentacle
I can't be eating this whole thing like that
I'll cut them up into pieces
Since this part is too chewy and tough to chew
It's like I'm dissecting the octopus
That cuts very easily
Cut it up like this

I've always wondered You know the center piece right here?
Is this here to poke it through like this?
It goes right through like this
Is it there to make a skewer? it's cool
That's tasty
Let's dip it in sesame oil
Can you guys see how tender it is?
It's crazy
It's even better with sesame oil
The suckers are terrifying
It looks like an alien
Does it stick if I do this?
It sticks!
I thought it won't because it's dead
Will it taste good with Ssamjang? (Spicy Soybean Paste)
I have garlic ssamjang here

It's a universal sauce
Everything tastes good with this
Let's eat the sashimi with cold spicy sauce with the noodles
I'm salivating
Wrap the octopus with it
Octopus noodles
Is the octopus too big? Whatever
Cut some up
Something about this is funny
Let's do 2 suckers a piece
It's cute
It's cute, right?
It gets tastier towards the end of the tentacle
I think the octopus will be finished too soon
Let's cut bigger pieces now
Is that too big?

Whatever
A big piece
*Cute fans
Can I have a photo with you?
Thank you
The ice is melted
That's amazing
Let's put them here
You can dip the octopus in Chojang (sweet red chili pepper sauce)
And also in sesame oil
You can use any sauce
I used to only like eating it with Chojang
But nowadays, I feel like the seafood loses its taste if you dip it in Chojang
It's all you can taste
So now I prefer sesame oil
The tentacles now..

What? There's only 3 left
What are these? Why are they all gone?
I didn't eat it When did I eat it?
Let's get 1 more noodles
It goes so well with this
This dish is the best for the Summer
Raw squid in here is good as well Sashimi is awesome too
It tastes so good
I love it
But it's not enough food
Yummy
Their Sashimi with Cold Spicy Sauce is really tasty And the octopus was cooked really well
What's really cool is that The octopus made it easier for humans
To poke a hole in here
And it slides in
Ta-da

It's been sitting here for a while and it's still tender
You can see the moles if you look here
These are..
I'm not sure what they are for either
I'll eat it anyway
The noodles with this dish go so well
The combination is as good as spicy noodles with whelk
Let's put more noodles
Refill on noodles please~ Okay!
Let's cut this one up too
It feels like I'm cutting up blood sausage
The last tentacle
Chopstick skewer
Put it here
I'll prepare the head as well
Cut 1 big piece first

The intestines are still in here
It looks like a brain..
This looks like a brain
The octopus head tastes really good
Better than the tentacles
Last!
Cutting up the octopus
Complete
What can I say?
It usually becomes hard to chew after it gets cold
Rock Octopus usually becomes unchewable Why is this okay? (Because this is not Rock Octopus)..
I'm not getting full off of 3kg of food I think because it's an octopus
Let's try this now
I've been wondering what this was
It looks very strange
It's not bad

But I won't eat it
It tastes okay
But yeah..
The head is delicious
Last piece!
Finished
Chili pepper..
I came to Gosung County today
And had sashimi and octopus
The seafood was super fresh maybe because we're by the ocean
The octopus was very tender and delicious
They say that there are must-see places here
And their beach was beautiful as well
I'm going to go for a walk now that I'm done eating
You can see mullet fish on the floor
They're not real

Black sea bream
I ate a lot of those
I think it's a perfect place to bring your kids
*Biking around the shore
There are fish and octopus here probably
*Tzuyang ♡ Subscribers
